title: MD
biography: Erwin Neher is a German biophysicist who co-developed the patch clamp technique for recording ion channel activity. Nobel Prize 1991.
aiSummary: Erwin Neher is a biophysics specialist at Max Planck Institute for Biophysical Chemistry. Based in Germany.
